html:
Exclusive to:

“Heals 24 health. If used by Walter and he has learned the Field Medic skill, it will heal an additional 12 health, also restoring 10 sanity.”

-

The Flutter Strip is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Field Medic skill. It requires 3 Butterfly Wings to make. When used, it heals 24 . If it is used by Walter with the Field Medic skill, it heals 36 and restores 10 .

Exclusive to:
“This bandage is really winging it.”
–Wilson
“Does it work on third-degree burns?”
–Willow
“Little butterfly died to heal our wound.”
–Wolfgang
“An ephemeral remedy woven from vanitas itself.”
–Wendy
“TEMPORARY PATCH”
–WX-78
“A delicate dressing made of butterfly wings.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's pretty pretty, eh?”
–Woodie
“Ew.”
–Maxwell
“If I had a bandage för every mere flesh wöund…”
–Wigfrid
“Sticker!”
–Webber
“I hope I don't lose it in the soup.”
–Warly
“Thank you, butterfriend”
–Wormwood
“Almost makes me wish I had a lil' boo-boo.”
–Winona
“Who? Who has a boo-boo?”
–Wortox
“Stick me!”
–Wurt
“It's made from butterfly wings! Cute! And a little sad.”
–Walter
“This will heal it up in no time at all.”
–Wanda
“Heals 24 health. If used by Walter and he has learned the Field Medic skill, it will heal an additional 12 health, also restoring 10 sanity.”

The Flutter Strip is a character-specific item exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can only be crafted by Walter after unlocking the Field Medic skill. It requires 3 Butterfly Wings to make. {{Scrapbook Info|Heals 24 health. If used by Walter and he has learned the Field Medic skill, it will heal an additional 12 health, also restoring 10 sanity.}}
The '''Flutter Strip''' is a character-specific item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]''. It can only be crafted by [[Walter/Don't Starve Together|Walter]] after unlocking the [[Field Medic]] skill. It requires 3 [[Butterfly Wings]] to make. When used, it heals 24 {{Hp}}. If it is used by Walter with the Field Medic skill, it heals 36 {{Hp}} and restores 10 {{Sanity}}. 

{{clear}}
{{Craftable Items and Structures on DST}}
